title: rosa canina var. aucheri
intro: Rosa canina var. aucheri, also known as the wild rose of Persia, is a variety of the dog rose plant (Rosa canina), a shrub native to the Middle East and parts of Europe. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rosa canina var. aucheri include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce menstrual cramps, and support immune function, among others. Herbal preparations of Rosa canina var. aucheri include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
